_comment: Projects banner content. Text fields accept a plain string OR a per-language object {en,ru,uz}. 'image' is an optional background asset path (relative to the site root, e.g. projects/banner.jpg); leave "" for a clean gradient banner. 'contact' and 'cta' are optional — remove them to hide.

subheading.en: Brand identity, product design, and visual work — a selection of projects.
subheading.ru: Фирменный стиль, продуктовый дизайн и визуальные работы — подборка проектов.
subheading.uz: Brend identikasi, mahsulot dizayni va vizual ishlar — loyihalar to‘plami.
